company.name: AutoStream
company.description: A SaaS product that provides automated video editing tools for content creators.

policies.refund: No refunds after 7 days of purchase. Refund requests within 7 days will be processed within 3-5 business days.
policies.support: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users have access to email support during business hours.
policies.trial: We offer a 7-day free trial for new users to explore all features.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV formats for both import and export.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade my plan anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade from Basic to Pro at any time. The price difference will be prorated.

faqs.question: What platforms can I export to?
faqs.answer: You can directly export to YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and download for other platforms.

faqs.question: How does AI captioning work?
faqs.answer: Our AI automatically transcribes your video and generates accurate captions in multiple languages. This feature is available on the Pro plan.
